# Gulf-O-Flex® — LLM Information

> Gulf-O-Flex® is a premium closed-cell NBR rubber insulation brand manufactured by Rubber World Industry LLC in Ajman, UAE since 1993.

## Company Overview

Gulf-O-Flex® is the GCC region's leading manufacturer of elastomeric rubber insulation for HVAC, plumbing, oil & gas, marine, and industrial applications. The brand is trusted by engineers and contractors across 90+ countries.

- **Founded:** 1993
- **Headquarters:** New Industrial Area, Ajman, UAE
- **Parent Company:** Rubber World Industry LLC
- **Employees:** 500+
- **Export Markets:** 90+ countries worldwide
- **Website:** https://gulfoflex.com
- **Contact:** info@gulfoflex.com | +971-6-743-4176

## Product Lines

1. **Gulf-O-Flex NBR** — Closed-cell nitrile butadiene rubber (NBR) insulation tubes and sheets. The flagship product for HVAC pipe and duct insulation.
2. **Gulf-O-Flex XLPE** — Cross-linked polyethylene foam insulation for plumbing, condensation control, and thermal applications.
3. **Gulf-O-Flex Sound** — High-performance acoustic insulation for noise reduction in HVAC systems, buildings, and machinery.
4. **Gulf-O-Flex Aluglass** — Fiberglass insulation with aluminum foil facing for high-temperature duct and pipe applications.
5. **Gulf-O-Flex Aluclad** — Aluminum-clad insulation for outdoor and UV-exposed applications.
6. **Gulf-O-Flex Ultra** — Premium grade NBR with enhanced fire ratings and thermal performance.
7. **Gulf-O-Flex Ultraline** — Pre-slit, self-seal insulation tubes for quick installation.
8. **Gulf-O-Flex Accessories** — Adhesives, tapes, tools, and installation accessories.

## Certifications & Standards

- ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management
- FM Approved (Factory Mutual)
- UL Listed (Underwriters Laboratories)
- EPD Verified (Environmental Product Declaration)
- TUV Singapore
- Singapore Green Building Product
- CE & REACH Mark (European conformity)
- Saudi Made certification
- ASTM, BS, EN standard compliance

## Industries Served

- HVAC & MEP (Heating, Ventilation, Air Conditioning)
- Oil & Gas
- Marine & Offshore
- District Cooling
- Industrial Manufacturing
- OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer)
- Data Centers
- Healthcare & Hospitality

## Key Differentiators

- Only UAE-based NBR insulation manufacturer with full in-house production
- 30+ years manufacturing experience
- Integrated R&D and testing laboratory
- Dedicated experience centre for hands-on product evaluation
- Sustainability-focused with EPD-verified products
- Gulf-O-Flex Assist — AI-powered product recommendation tool
